title: My work not matching the calendar
excerpt:
Hi, 
We are having issues with My Work. If you go to the table option, you can clearly see the items with their corresponding deadlines and all. See screenshots, but when you go to the calendar, the item is missing, chec…

posts.author: lucasp (Lucas Pianelli)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We are having issues with My Work. If you go to the table option, you can clearly see the items with their corresponding deadlines and all. See screenshots, but when you go to the calendar, the item is missing, checked every setting, and they seem to be fine.

Thanks in advance

image2225×1095 198 KB

image2217×1159 93.8 KB

image2206×1172 80.2 KB

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @lucasp , I think it is something to do with sub items. Does “Develop Other Post -Decision Compliance Work” show in the calendar? it’s a sub task too. Seems there’s a feature suggestion and one user giving some troubleshooting tips as it’s working for them. Maybe this will help.

https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360019300579-My-Work
